summary: Large tydisplay decomp/matching PR centered on src/melee/ty/tydisplay.c, adding many recovered functions, local structs, includes, and type/signature cleanup, with small caller/header updates in ground, item, toy, tylist, and types. Bot report recorded 8 new matched tydisplay items and 15 improved unmatched items, while review focused on replacing raw assert/panic/string handling with project idioms.

key_files.role: Primary decomp target; adds recovered tydisplay code, local TyDsp structs, includes, quicksort helper, layout/grid/display functions, assert/report cleanup, and many function bodies replacing placeholders.
Header surface updated for tydisplay declarations/signatures.
Adds ty-related type declarations used by tydisplay changes.
Prototype cleanup: un_80305D00 changed from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to float un_80305D00(void).
Typed stack array/call cleanup for un_8031C354 usage, replacing casts with s32 array and direct indexed pointer.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: it_8027CC88 sp1C changed u32[10] to s32[10] and call casts removed

key_files.role: Caller update: passes tyDisplay_8031C2EC result into un_8031C454 before storing stage_info.x6E4[0].

what_changed.text: Replaced many tydisplay placeholder markers with C bodies, including un_8031830C, un_80318714, un_80318B1C, un_80318CB4, un_80319540 and later functions visible in bot report.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists matched/improved tydisplay functions

what_changed.text: Introduced local TyDsp* structs such as TyDspBaseData, TyDspArchiveHolder, TyDspBgData, TyDspArchNames, TyDspNameTables, TyDspSceneGfx, TyDspPos, TyDspGrid, and TyDspConfig to express data access.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: typedef block near top of tydisplay.c

what_changed.text: Added a shared inline quicksort(TySortElem* base, s32 lo, s32 hi), with un_8031830C and un_80318714 calling it.
Cleaned an item-side call by making sp1C an s32 array and passing sp1C / &sp1C[temp_r3] directly to un_8031C354 instead of casted address expressions.
Updated a ground caller so un_8031C454 receives temp_r30 from tyDisplay_8031C2EC.
Updated toy.h to give un_80305D00 a concrete float-returning no-argument prototype.

smart_moves.text: Used local temporary structs for recovered tydisplay data layouts instead of leaving all accesses as raw offset math in the visible diff.
Converted a generated-looking item call surface to typed s32 array access, reducing casts and pointer-shape noise at the callsite.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: it_2725.c sp1C and un_8031C354 changes

smart_moves.text: Reviewer-requested cleanup replaced at least one raw __assert("tydisplay.c", 0xC6U, "0") pattern with HSD_ASSERT(0xC6, 0) in the excerpted diff.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a raw __assert has condition string "0", reviewers may expect HSD_ASSERT(line, 0) rather than preserving the direct __assert expansion.
evidence_refs: review_comments: PsiLupan requested HSD_ASSERT and guessed string was condition 0

decomp_lessons.lesson: If a stack array's element type is known by a recovered callee signature, update the local array type and callsites instead of preserving casted generated pointer expressions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: un_8031C354 calls changed from casted expressions to sp1C and &sp1C[temp_r3]

decomp_lessons.lesson: Recovered function bodies can justify header prototype cleanup from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to concrete signatures, as shown by un_80305D00 becoming float un_80305D00(void).

naming_conventions.convention: New local recovered types use a TyDsp prefix for tydisplay-specific structs, with offset-style field names where semantics remain uncertain.
Address-style function names were retained for many recovered symbols where semantic names were not evidenced.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Narrow PAD_STACK use appears in recovered functions/helpers, including PAD_STACK(16), PAD_STACK(0x50), and PAD_STACK(0x28). Evidence does not include justification beyond matching context.
The PR used an inline quicksort helper to share a generated sorting shape between un_8031830C and un_80318714 while preserving wrapper symbols.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: inline void quicksort and wrappers

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: One comparison uses bit reinterpretation through *(s32*) &sort[n].val in a sort partition, likely to influence exact codegen; evidence does not prove whether this was final preferred style or a temporary matching tactic.
Bot report indicates text-section progress: 8 new matches and 15 improved unmatched items in main/melee/ty/tydisplay, including function-level and data-section score movement.

review_feedback.feedback: Use HSD_ASSERT for a raw assert; reviewer guessed the string was condition 0.
Same HSD_ASSERT cleanup requested for another similar raw assert.
For an OSPanic, replace the filename with __FILE__ and declare the actual string, to make matching and later file linking easier.
A static string/value should be used directly in the actual function call rather than declared separately above.

follow_up_queries: un_8031C354 sp1C s32 array cast cleanup

notes: Changed-file list and PR metadata are complete enough for identity, file paths, and line counts.
Diff and review comments are truncated, so not every function body or review hunk could be inspected.
The decomp-dev bot report records match/progress numbers, but this intake did not independently validate builds, objdiff, or final regression state.
Review feedback is supported by loaded review excerpts/examples, but final author response and exact final resolution for all comments is not fully visible.

accepted_candidate_records.title: HSD_ASSERT preferred over raw __assert for condition-0 assert expansions
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2297, reviewer PsiLupan asked to replace raw __assert usage in tydisplay.c with HSD_ASSERT, noting the string appeared to be condition 0; the diff excerpt shows HSD_ASSERT(0xC6, 0) for that case.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Typed stack arrays can remove generated callsite casts
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2297 changed it_8027CC88's sp1C from u32[10] to s32[10] and simplified un_8031C354 calls from casted address expressions to direct sp1C pointers.

source_update_candidates.title: OSPanic cleanup may prefer __FILE__ and real string declarations
source_update_candidates.text: A PR #2297 reviewer requested that an OSPanic use __FILE__ for the filename and declare the actual string, saying it makes matching and linking the file later easier.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potentially reusable review guidance, but the loaded slice lacks the full hunk and final resolution; curator should compare with existing assert/report macro standards before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: Avoid unnecessary static declarations for strings used only at one callsite
source_update_candidates.text: A PR #2297 reviewer said a value/string should be used directly in the actual function call and should not need a static declaration above.
source_update_candidates.reason: May reinforce existing literal/data ownership standards, but evidence is only a review comment example without the exact surrounding diff.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the use of PAD_STACK in this PR as accepted style; the slice shows PAD_STACK occurrences but no explicit verifier justification.
Do not infer semantic meanings for offset-style TyDsp fields beyond names visible in the diff.
Do not treat bot-reported data-section score improvements as a general recommendation to chase data parity; the PR evidence is primarily text-section matching progress.
